rationale: No relation between homestead exemption increase and postsecondary education MOU provision. Different subject matter, no fiscal or operational overlap.
quote: Sec. 19.012. POSTSECONDARY EDUCATION. The district and the department shall enter into a memorandum of understanding for postsecondary education programs to be administered by the district.
_note: Rule text concerns postsecondary education MOU; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict identified.
